rag_rules: Use the extracted AADL structure as the source of truth for declaration kind and ownership before attaching any annex block.
Keep type-scoped contract content on component types and implementation-scoped binding content on component implementations.
When inserting into an implementation body, keep the annex after the structural declarations it depends on.
generic_rules: Fuse into the exact matched owner declaration rather than a similarly named neighbor.
Preserve existing features, subcomponents, connections, properties, and ordering except for minimal local formatting needed for insertion.
If the owner already contains an AGREE annex, update that owner locally instead of creating a duplicate owner or moving unrelated text.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use the form `annex agree {** ... **};` and must remain fully inside the chosen owner declaration.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only content on a component type or type-only content on an implementation.
Do not rewrite architecture declarations to make the generated annex fit.
irrelevant_topics: Boolean expression examples for contract semantics
Validator-driven expression repair for numeric, property, or event-port misuse
